name: Manual S Quick Reference & Calculator
description: Equipment sizing validation per ACCA Manual S standards

cooling_capacity.name: Total Cooling Capacity
cooling_capacity.description: Equipment capacity as percentage of calculated load

high_shr.rule: Total capacity max = Total load + 15,000 BTU
high_shr.note: When sensible heat ratio exceeds 95%, additional capacity is allowed

manager_approval.note: Can go as low as 90% with manager approval

latent_capacity.name: Latent Cooling Capacity
latent_capacity.note: Determined by Sensible & Total capacity - not an issue if higher than 150%

backup_strip.note: Electric strip for backup doesn't need 100% unless primary heating < 100%

static_pressure.note: Select CFM from air handler/furnace product data based on airflow vs static pressure

system_type_guidance.humid_climate: Variable speed air handler preferred (FL and similar)

equipment_matching.air_handler_level: Should match condenser level (don't pair high-end condenser with low-end air handler)
equipment_matching.downflow: Ensure appropriate downflow model and downflow-capable coil

ahri_requirements.models: Must match what is selected in Wrightsoft
ahri_requirements.region: Must be correct for project location
ahri_requirements.ratings: SEER/EER/HSPF/AFUE must match equipment input tab

calculator_formulas.temp_rise: Supply Air Temp - Return Air Temp
